description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa upholstered in a teal blue fabric. The sofa features two large, square backrest cushions with subtle button tufting, and a single, continuous seat cushion with a similar tufted pattern. The armrests are straight, thick, and padded, running parallel to the seat and positioned at the same height as the seat cushion. The sofa stands on four short, slender legs, likely made of metal, which are only partially visible from the front. The back of the sofa is flat and fully upholstered, matching the rest of the piece. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern teal blue two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, tufted cushions, and slender metal legs. Its minimalist design and compact form make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large tufted back cushions, a single tufted seat cushion, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, fully upholstered back and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, square backrest cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion, all attached and uniformly tufted.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick, and padded armrests at seat height, running parallel to the seat with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slender legs with a metallic finish, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed under the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with two attached, square cushions featuring subtle button tufting; continuous and uniform in height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid teal blue fabric with a subtle tufted texture on both the seat and back cushions, no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
